message:
fix(database): fix async pool double-lock and incorrect cancellation error

- finish_async_checkout: eliminate TOCTOU double-lock by taking mut lock
  from the start, decrementing total before dropping the lock
- AsyncDbPool::get: map Outcome::Cancelled to DbPoolError::Cancelled
  instead of DbPoolError::Timeout (cancellation ≠ timeout)
- Add DbPoolError::Cancelled variant with Display impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
